# UPPAL Design

> UK architecture studio crafting refined residential, commercial, and interior spaces with thoughtful, process-led design.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview, featured projects, and services.
- [About](/about): Studio story, mission, values, and team.
- [Services](/services): Architecture, interiors, planning, and consultancy.
- [Process](/process): Five-stage design and delivery process.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected residential and commercial work.
- [Blog](/blog): Architecture insights, design ideas, and studio updates.
- [Contact](/contact): Studio contact details and project enquiries.
